settings.editor: Vetiver Without Borders mission is to develop and popularize the use of the Vetiver System around the world, providing communities with easy access to it. This soil conservation and regeneration system has the potential to become a great tool in the fight against climate change by offering a real, effective, simple and low-cost solution to address the problems of rainwater management, soil erosion, soil and water quality and more generally the consequences of climate change.

At VSF, we dream of a world where environmental and local actors hold the resources and techniques to restore their ecosystems. To transform what is now arid and empty places into abundance of life and ressources. We want to create a world where soil areas which are degraded today become green places that sequester carbon from the air and contribute massively to the fight against climate change.

Our organization focuses on issues that affect us all, like soil and water quality, climate change and natural disasters. These are problems that require local mobilization to acquire a global impact. Solidarity is therefore essential to offer solutions that improve community resiliency on these issues.

We intend to answer people's needs in the realization of their locally-led projects. Our approach is based on answering needs described by community leaders conducting their own project. The Foundation is therefore there to provide knowledge and technical support, in the form of a soil regeneration toolbox, for the project to be completed.

We intend to involve as much as possible women and girls in our activities so that they can participate in the process and ultimately appropriate and recreate the knowledge, skills and regeneration techniques we provide.

VSF is particularly concerned with diversity, openness and tolerance, but also with equality in the dialogue. We are commited to offering equal opportunities and support for everyone regardless of gender, sexual orientation, ethnicity, age or socio-economic status.

Results-based approach. We believe that if our vision is to be fullfilled, the organization has to be focused on offering tangible, measurable results. We understand that we are privileged to work for a cause we believe in, and that the most important thing is to focus on how to get the job done.

That is why every project has established goals with measurable targets with transparent key indicators.
The Foundation supports innovations and research on Vetiver System for communities in environmental emergencies.
In order to fight soil degradation and water quality on a large scale, the Foundation's mission is to develop and grow the Vetiver System through sharing and increasing awareness around it.

VSF also supports the implementation of the Vetiver System for communities in environmental emergencies. The selected projects will follow the charitable objectives of the foundation and prioritize communities that benefit from the Vetiver System to: 

  • Reduce the risks and effects of environmental disasters
  • Protect infrastructure
  • Restore deforested watersheds
  • Eliminate pollution from natural environments

Vetiver Without Borders' mission is to participate in the worldwide fight against climate change, by offering concrete, effective, simple and low-cost solutions to address the problems of rainwater management, soil erosion, soil and water quality and more generally the consequences of climate change.

settings.title: Let's tell future generations that we can have a positive footprint​
